mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction (asset_id, user_id, type, transaction_date, due_date, note, signature_data, ocr_data) VALUES (#{assetId}, #{userId}, #{type}, NOW(), #{dueDate}, #{note}, #{signatureData}, #{ocrData})
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, a.name as assetName, a.serial_number as assetSerial, u.email as userEmail, u.role as userRole, u.department as userDepartment FROM transaction t LEFT JOIN asset a ON t.asset_id = a.id JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id ORDER BY t.transaction_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.*, a.name as assetName, a.serial_number as assetSerial, u.email as userEmail, u.role as userRole, u.department as userDepartment FROM transaction t LEFT JOIN asset a ON t.asset_id = a.id JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.asset_id = #{assetId} ORDER BY t.transaction_date DESC
